question: Identify the root cause of the network fault: which device, what changed, and why it breaks.
description:
R4 changes the remote-as on its iBGP neighbor toward R2 from `100` to
`200`. R2 still has `router bgp 100` locally. When R4 sends OPEN
advertising AS 200, R2 expects 100 and rejects with Bad Peer AS. The
iBGP session never reaches Established; PE-A and PE-B stop exchanging
prefixes.
expected_rca:
Root cause: on R4, the iBGP neighbor toward R2 was reconfigured with remote-as 200 while R2 is router bgp 100.
R4's BGP OPEN now advertises AS 200, but R2 expects the locally configured peer AS to match its own AS 100 for an iBGP session; because the advertised and expected AS disagree, the BGP session cannot be brought up and PE-A and PE-B stop exchanging prefixes.
Fix: set the R2 neighbor's remote-as back to 100 on R4.
expected_symptoms_summary:
BGP session state change (%ROUTING-BGP-5-ADJCHANGE):
- R2: neighbor 192.0.2.4.
- R4: neighbor 192.0.2.2.

%ROUTING-BGP-5-NSR_STATE_CHANGE reported by R2, R4 (2 instances):
- R2: Changed state to NSR-Ready
- R4: Changed state to NSR-Ready

apply.commands:
configure terminal
router bgp 100
no neighbor 192.0.2.2
!
neighbor 192.0.2.2
 remote-as 200
 update-source Loopback0
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  route-policy PASS in
  route-policy PASS out

revert.commands:
configure terminal
router bgp 100
no neighbor 192.0.2.2
!
neighbor 192.0.2.2
 remote-as 100
 update-source Loopback0
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  route-policy PASS in
  route-policy PASS out

expected_symptoms: RP/0/RP0/CPU0:May 17 22:16:10.304 UTC: bgp[1084]: %ROUTING-BGP-5-ADJCHANGE : neighbor 192.0.2.4 Down - Peer closing down the session (VRF: default) (AS: 100)
RP/0/RP0/CPU0:May 17 22:16:10.302 UTC: bgp[1084]: %ROUTING-BGP-5-ADJCHANGE : neighbor 192.0.2.2 Down - Remote AS configuration changed (VRF: default) (AS: 200)
RP/0/RP0/CPU0:May 17 22:16:10.305 UTC: bgp[1084]: %ROUTING-BGP-5-NSR_STATE_CHANGE : Changed state to NSR-Ready
RP/0/RP0/CPU0:May 17 22:16:10.305 UTC: bgp[1084]: %ROUTING-BGP-5-NSR_STATE_CHANGE : Changed state to NSR-Ready
